actions.title: Set Alternate Description  (OpenAI)
actions.name: pdfix_generate_alternate_text_openai
actions.desc: Automatically generates alternate text for Figure and Formula tags using OpenAI, embedding it into each tag’s Alt attribute [Cloud]

args.title: Prompt
args.name: prompt
args.desc: Prompt used to generate alternate text.
args.value: You are creating alt text for an image used in a tagged PDF document.   Instructions:   - Provide only the alt text, in {lang} language.   - Describe the image clearly and concisely, focusing on its main content and purpose.   - Use the surrounding PDF structure to infer the image’s context, but do not restate the surrounding text verbatim.   - If the image represents a concept already described nearby, summarize its visual role (e.g., “Flowchart showing data processing steps”).   - Avoid unnecessary detail or interpretation.   Here are the surrounding PDF tags (for context):

args.title: Overwrite
args.desc: Replace the alternate text if it exists
args.name: overwrite

args.title: Tag Name
args.name: tag_name
args.desc: Tag name defined by a regular expression

args.title: Surrounding Tag Count
args.name: tag_count
args.desc: How many surrounding tags are included into prompt for AI. For Number 2 1 before and 1 after is taken. Custom prompt does not fill surrounding tags.

actions.title: Set Table Summary  (OpenAI)
actions.name: pdfix_generate_table_summary_openai
actions.desc: Automatically generates table summaries for Table tags using OpenAI, inserting them into each tag’s Summary attribute [Cloud]

args.title: Tag Name
args.name: tag_name
args.desc: Tag name defined by a regular expression

args.title: Prompt
args.name: prompt
args.desc: Prompt used to generate table summary.
args.value: Describe the table in {lang} language concisely without repeating its data. Keep the response brief and focus on structure and content. Provide only the response without any additional explanation or context.   The table is part of a PDF document. Use the surrounding tags to understand its context and purpose, but do not repeat their text verbatim. Focus on summarizing what the table represents and how it relates to the surrounding content.   Here are the surrounding PDF tags for context:

args.title: Overwrite
args.desc: Replace the table summary if it exists
args.name: overwrite

args.title: Surrounding Tag Count
args.name: tag_count
args.desc: How many surrounding tags are included into prompt for AI. For Number 2 1 before and 1 after is taken. Custom prompt does not fill surrounding tags.

actions.title: Set Formula MathML  (OpenAI)
actions.name: pdfix_generate_formula_mathml_openai
actions.desc: Automatically generates MathML for Formula tags using OpenAI, attaching it as an associated file to each tag [Cloud]

args.title: Prompt
args.name: prompt
args.desc: Prompt used to generate formula's MathML.
args.value: Return only the full and valid XML representation of the mathematical expression in MathML {math_ml_version} format, with no markdown, no comments, and no explanation.   The output must:   - Begin with the opening <math> tag with the correct namespace.   - Do not stop generating until every opened XML tag is properly closed, ending with </math>.   - If the XML would be truncated, continue until the <math> element is fully closed.   - Contain valid and well-formed XML.   - Not include any incomplete or truncated tags or elements.   - Be a complete representation of the expression shown in the image.   Do not include any text before or after the XML.   Only output the MathML content.   The formula is part of a PDF document. Use the surrounding tags to help interpret and reconstruct the expression accurately, but do not include any of their content in the output.   Here are the surrounding PDF tags for context:

args.title: Tag Name
args.name: tag_name
args.desc: Tag name defined by a regular expression

args.title: Surrounding Tag Count
args.name: tag_count
args.desc: How many surrounding tags are included into prompt for AI. For Number 2 1 before and 1 after is taken. Custom prompt does not fill surrounding tags.

actions.title: Set Formula MathML (OpenAI)
actions.name: pdfix_generate_formula_mathml_from_image_to_xml_openai
actions.desc: Automatically generates MathML from an image file using OpenAI, saving it as an XML file [Cloud]

args.name: input_jpg
args.desc: Input image file containing picture of formula

args.name: output_xml
args.desc: XML file containing MathML representation of formula

args.title: Prompt
args.name: prompt
args.desc: Prompt used to generate formula's MathML.
args.value: Return only the full and valid XML representation of the mathematical expression in MathML {math_ml_version} format, with no markdown, no comments, and no explanation.   The output must:   - Begin with the opening <math> tag with the correct namespace.   - Do not stop generating until every opened XML tag is properly closed, ending with </math>.   - If the XML would be truncated, continue until the <math> element is fully closed.   - Contain valid and well-formed XML.   - Not include any incomplete or truncated tags or elements.   - Be a complete representation of the expression shown in the image.   Do not include any text before or after the XML.   Only output the MathML content.
